title: valeriana crinii subsp. crinii
intro: Valeriana crinii subsp. crinii, also known as the Himalayan valerian, is a sub-species of the valerian plant, a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, antispasmodic, and anxiolytic effects, making it useful in treating insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness. The health benefits of valeriana crinii subsp. crinii include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle spasms and cramps. Valeriana crinii subsp. crinii can be consumed as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
